brand_identity.name: Ladhani Education & Migration Services (OPC) Pvt. Ltd
taglines: India's Trusted Immigration Experts & Education Consultant
100% Refund Guarantee on Negative Skill Assessment / Visa Rejection
Get Expert Help for Canada or Australia PR Today

design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Premium editorial aesthetic mixed with SaaS conversion mechanics
Emotion First: High trust, authoritative, calming visuals to reduce migration anxiety
Generous Spacing: Large padding (p-8 to p-16) for breathing room
Mobile-first: Thumb-friendly controls, sticky CTAs, optimized tables for Indian mobile traffic
Micro-animations: Lenis smooth scroll, hover lifts, progress bar fills

/.name: Mega Landing Page
/.seo_title: Find Your Migration Pathway in 60 Seconds | LEAMSS

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: 2-column or centered wide. Strong H1 (Playfair Display), Subheading with refund guarantee.
components: Start AI Eligibility Quiz CTA (Accent Color)

sections.name: Compare Visa Side-by-Side
sections.layout: Cards + Table approach. Grouped by outcomes.

sections.name: Featured Occupations
sections.layout: Bento Grid or 12-tile CSS Grid (4 AU, 4 CA, 4 NZ).

/atlas.seo_title: Global Migration Atlas & Occupation List 2026 | LEAMSS

/atlas/:country.name: Country Browse

Buttons.primary: bg-[#D4633F] text-white hover:bg-[#B85333] transition-all rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-semibold
Buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1F4D44] border border-[#1F4D44] hover:bg-[#F7F9F8] transition-all rounded-md px-6 py-3
Buttons.ghost: text-[#1F4D44] hover:bg-[#F7F9F8] transition-all rounded-md px-4 py-2

Cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-[#E5EBE9] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all p-6

StickyFooterLead.layout: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-[#1F4D44] text-white p-4 z-50 flex justify-between items-center

image_urls.description: Sydney Opera House sunset, use with #1F4D44 color burn or dark overlay

logos.instructions_to_main_agent: Use typography-based logos if actual SVGs for partner universities (DY Patil, Jain, Manipal, Amity, UKIQ) or badges (NAAC, NIRF, UGS, QS, WES) are unavailable. NEVER use placeholder text like 'via.placeholder.com'. Format them neatly in grayscale to fit the trust strip.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement all designs using standard HTML tags heavily styled with Tailwind CSS. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Accordions, Tabs, Dialogs) but heavily customize them to remove standard Vercel aesthetic. Enforce the #1F4D44 and #D4633F color scheme globally. Ensure mobile-first responsive design, especially for the comparison table (use accordion or horizontal scroll) and sticky footer. Apply Lenis smooth scroll and Framer Motion for scroll reveals.
